creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
It looks like this: https://imgur.com/D6eNou4l.png
And is 100% reproducible for me, even on a clean profile and on different versions of Firefox (50, 51, compiled from ports, installed as a pkg).

On about:preferences (and about:addons) pages I am getting such a message in the Error Console:

SDK worker-child started as frozen on unexpected initial document.readyState Object { initialDocumentReadyState: "uninitialized", windowLocation: "about:preferences" }  worker-child.js:62 [ view-source:resource://gre/modules/commonjs/sdk/content/worker-child.js ]
